repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(subagent): preserve steered task text on restart redispatch
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair plan for #77539:

What Problem This Solves

Clears the remaining stale Copilot inline review comments by replacing references to nonexistent redispatchSubagentRunAfterRestart with wording that points at the actual subagent restart/resume recovery path.

Why This Change Was Made

The PR already implements the steered-task persistence behavior. The bounded remaining repair is comment accuracy in src/agents/subagent-registry-run-manager.ts and src/agents/subagent-registry.steer-restart.test.ts.

User Impact

No runtime behavior change from this repair. It keeps the existing PR landable review path focused and preserves @amittell's source contribution.

Evidence

Validate with pnpm test src/agents/subagent-registry.steer-restart.test.ts and pnpm check:changed.
credit_notes: Repair source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/77539 in place so @amittell's original contribution and PR history remain canonical.
Do not replace the PR branch unless a fresh executor refetch shows maintainer_can_modify=false or the branch became unsafe.
